message.content:
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam arrowStyle filled
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment center
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 5
skinparam participantVerticalMargin 5
skinparam participantHorizontalMargin 5
skinparam participantVerticalSpacing 5
skinparam participantHorizontalSpacing 5
skinparam participantVerticalOffset 0
skinparam participantHorizontalOffset 0
skinparam participantVerticalShift 0
skinparam participantHorizontalShift 0
skinparam participantVerticalScale 1
skinparam participantHorizontalScale 1
skinparam participantVerticalRotation 0
skinparam participantHorizontalRotation 0
skinparam participantVerticalSkew 0
skinparam participantHorizontalSkew 0
skinparam participantVerticalFlip false
skinparam participantHorizontalFlip false
skinparam participantVerticalMirror false
skinparam participantHorizontalMirror false
skinparam participantVerticalInvert false
skinparam participantHorizontalInvert false
skinparam participantVerticalReverse false
skinparam participantHorizontalReverse false
skinparam participantVerticalTranspose false
skinparam participantHorizontalTranspose false
skinparam participantVerticalRotate false
skinparam participantHorizontalRotate false
skinparam participantVerticalReflect false
skinparam participantHorizontalReflect false
skinparam participantVerticalShear false
skinparam participantHorizontalShear false
skinparam participantVerticalStretch false
skinparam participantHorizontalStretch false
skinparam participantVerticalCompress false
skinparam participantHorizontalCompress false
skinparam participantVerticalExpand false
skinparam participantHorizontalExpand false
skinparam participantVerticalContract false
skinparam participantHorizontalContract false
skinparam participantVerticalDilate false
skinparam participantHorizontalDilate false
skinparam participantVerticalErode false
skinparam participantHorizontalErode false
skinparam participantVerticalDilate false
skinparam participantHorizontalDilate false
skinparam participantVerticalErode false
skinparam participantHorizontalErode false
skinparam participantVerticalDilate false
skinparam participantHorizontalDilate false
skinparam participantVerticalErode false
skinparam participantHorizontalErode false

actor User
participant "libdrift" as libdrift
participant "Advertisement channel" as ad_channel
participant "Control channel" as control_channel
participant "driftd" as driftd
database "Neo4j" as neo4j
database "MongoDB" as mongodb

User -> libdrift: get Part value
note right of User: Retrieval message contains\nindex specifier\nindex value
libdrift -> control_channel: send retrieval message
libdrift --> User: ACK
control_channel -> driftd: get Part value
activate driftd
driftd -> driftd: Lookup Part UUID in index
driftd -> neo4j: Get Part info
alt Composite Part
    loop foreach Part
        driftd -> neo4j: Get Part metadata with UUID
        driftd -> mongodb: Get Part values
    end
else Simple Part
    driftd -> neo4j: Get Part metadata with UUID
    driftd -> mongodb: Get Part values
end
driftd -> driftd: build update message
driftd -> ad_channel: Update messages for Part values
ad_channel --> User: receive update message
deactivate driftd

@enduml
